OpenAPI specs

Browse integrations Agent Octo can understand

Each card below maps to a YAML OpenAPI spec. Open a spec to inspect its methods, parameters, responses, and copy the source directly.

Airtable Records & Comments API

API for viewing Airtable records and record comments using OAuth2.

v1.0.04 methods

Apollo.io Organization Search via URL

Search organizations using Apollo.io via a saved URL from the Apollo UI. This endpoint parses and executes searches from saved Apollo links. ⚠️ Consumes one credit per call.

v1.0.11 methods

Blockchain Ticker API

Returns current Bitcoin price in various currencies.

v1.0.01 methods

Dropbox API - File & Folder Listing

OpenAPI spec including file requests, files/folders listing, and file download endpoints.

v1.2.04 methods

Google Calendar API - Create Events

Minimal OpenAPI spec for creating events in Google Calendar using OAuth 2.0

v1.0.01 methods

Google Drive API

Interact with Google Drive to list files and track changes. This API lets you search, filter, and monitor files and changes in a user's or shared drive.

v1.0.04 methods

Google People API - Contacts

Interact programmatically with a user's Google contacts using the People API. Supports reading, creating, updating, deleting, searching, and batch operations on contacts, with field selection and pagination. OAuth2 is required for all operations.

vv18 methods

Serper Search API

OpenAPI specification for the Serper Google Search endpoint. Authentication is performed using an API key passed via the X-API-KEY header.

v1.0.01 methods
